nodes.title: REQUIREMENTS
widgets_values:
## Workflow Prerequisites ##

This workflow requires the following custom nodes, which can be obtained via ComfyUI-Manager:

  * Z-Image Power Nodes: https://github.com/martin-rizzo/ComfyUI-ZImagePowerNodes

 Additionally, ensure you have the following 3 models downloaded and placed in their respective
 directories within your ComfyUI installation:

  z_image_turbo_bf16.safetensors
    * Download: https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/blob/main/split_files/diffusion_models/z_image_turbo_bf16.safetensors
    * Local Directory: `ComfyUI/models/diffusion_models/`

  qwen_3_4b.safetensors
    * Download: https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/blob/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_3_4b.safetensors
    * Local Directory: `ComfyUI/models/text_encoders/`

  ae.safetensors
    * Download: https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/blob/main/split_files/vae/ae.safetensors
    * Local Directory: `Comfyui/models/vae/`

## More Info ##

- https://github.com/martin-rizzo/ComfyUI-ZImagePowerNodes
- https://civitai.com/models/2322533/z-image-power-nodes

Created by Martin Rizzo
  GitHub : https://github.com/martin-rizzo
  CivitAI: https://civitai.com/user/Photographer
  Reddit : https://www.reddit.com/user/FotografoVirtual

nodes.title: README
widgets_values:
Reference workflow for text-to-image using the Z-Image Turbo model and the Power Nodes.

Select the desired size and aspect ratio of the output image using the "Empty Z-Image Latent Image" node. This node also offers an option to activate "landscape" mode for horizontal orientation.

Compose your text prompt and choose your preferred visual style using the "Style & Prompt Encoder" node, establishing the aesthetic direction of your image.

Fine-tune your image details within the "Z-Sampler Turbo ^G2" node:

- steps: Adjust the number of sampling iterations to control image detail. Generally, 8 steps are sufficient; fewer steps (e.g. '3') allow for quick visualization of prompt changes, as the sampler preserves the image composition across its entire step range. Default: 8

- intensity: This parameter affects the saturation and contrast levels of the output image. Values above 1.0 produce a more vibrant appearance, while values below 1.0 yield a softer, more "washed-out" look. Default: 0.0

- intensity_bias: Provides finer control similar to 'brightness'. However, its exact impact varies depending on the prompt and selected style, so it may not always function as a simple brightness control. Default: 0.0

- turbo_creativity: Enhances the diversity of generated images by altering the composition while retaining the prompt instructions and visual style. This feature may introduce hallucinations, which can be reduced by selecting the "refined" options, adding extra sampling steps to improve image coherence.
    * off              : Turbo Creativity disabled
    * scrambled        : Turbo Creativity enabled
    * refined (1-step) : Turbo Creativity + 1 sampling step for coherence
    * refined (2-steps): Turbo Creativity + 2 sampling steps for coherence

The interior of a bar features an architecture of rounded, modular forms. A bar extends horizontally along the frame, displaying a strip of acrylic. To the left, an elegant black xenomorph, her biomechanical form glowing in a dim light, sits on a bar stool. She wears a tight crimson corset and a leather skirt, holding a tall glass in one hand, raised in a toast as she looks to the right. Her elongated, angular features are accentuated with a subtle bioluminescence. To the right, a cylindrical column supports a vertical neon panel that reads "OPEN 24 HOURS." To the right, a man in his thirties stands at the bar, turning to look at the camera with a playful smile; his glass is reflected in the xenomorph's in a silent, interstellar toast. Behind the bar, in the center of the image, an imposing, octopus-like alien bartender twitches his tentacles, wearing smart black trousers, his octopus eyes glareing in displeasure. Behind the bartender, a mirrored wall reflects rows of liquor bottles with geometric labels. Above the bar floats a neon sign made of curved glass tubes that reads 'COSMIC LOUNGE' in tall, rounded letters, emitting light with a soft, glowing halo. An illuminated menu board reads 'SIGNATURE DRINKS' with three items: 'ORBITAL HIGHBALL,' 'NEBULA SOUR,' and 'ROCKET MARTINI,' each displayed on glowing horizontal bars. To the right, a cylindrical column features a vertical neon panel that reads 'OPEN 24 HOURS' in condensed letters within a translucent strip. To the left, a curved booth sits beneath a domed ceiling light. An illuminated sign reading 'GALAXY BAR SERVICE' encircles the inner rim of the dome in capitals and dominates the left side of the frame. Soft lighting reflects off the glass and acrylic surfaces, highlighting the structural design.
